title: GlacialAge
description: Ice Age period mammals in Minecraft!
body:
![GlacialAge logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f1afab00d5ce2026776d8390d0544a93006d0ed.jpeg)





GlacialAge is a minecraft mod that brings the mammals of the Cenozoic era back to life. To clone any mammal from the mod you need to proceed a complex system.

Tutorial is here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/F8jjRDDRpJ4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**For this mod to work you need to download [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)!**


Discord:
[https://discord.com/invite/WJs9xRQC87](https://discord.com/invite/WJs9xRQC87)

Twitter(𝕏):
[https://x.com/GlacialAgeMod](https://x.com/GlacialAgeMod)

Mammals:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Woolly Mammoth

Smilodon

Neanderthal

Megaloceros

Woolly Rhinoceros

Paraceratherium

Megatherium

Dire Wolf

Hyaenodon

Giant Short-faced Bear

</details>
